entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: Cereal staple crop important in subtropical and semi-arid regions of Africa and Asia

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: Region where sorghum is a staple crop and micronutrient malnutrition is prevalent

entities.name: ASIA
entities.description: Region where sorghum is a staple crop

entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A cheap source of energy and micronutrients

entities.name: CENTRAL INDIA
entities.description: Region where population depends on sorghum for dietary energy and micronutrients

entities.name: MICRONUTRIENT MALNUTRITION
entities.description: Result of diets deficient in bioavailable vitamins and minerals, causing blindness and anemia

entities.name: BLINDNESS
entities.description: A health condition caused by micronutrient malnutrition

entities.name: ANEMIA
entities.description: A health condition caused by micronutrient malnutrition

entities.name: FORTIFIED FOODS
entities.description: Foods provided to vulnerable groups to combat malnutrition

entities.name: BIOFORTIFICATION
entities.description: Cost-effective and sustainable solution for tackling micronutrient deficiencies

entities.name: MICRONUTRIENT DEFICIENCIES
entities.description: Lack of essential micronutrients in the diet

entities.name: IRON
entities.description: Mineral micronutrient targeted for increase in sorghum grains via biofortification

entities.name: ZINC
entities.description: Mineral micronutrient targeted for increase in sorghum grains via biofortification

entities.name: GRAINS
entities.description: Part of the sorghum plant where iron and zinc levels are increased
